intent: Write a sentiment vs storefront ratings analysis on over-the-counter health-household products. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the health-household category and collect at least 5 products spanning at least three subtypes (sleep aid, pain relief, vitamin/supplement, first aid, or cleaning). Record name, price, rating, and review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/science AND /f/AskReddit for posts discussing which OTC products actually have evidence behind them, placebo effects, or consumer warnings. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, and comment count. The report must: (a) list each storefront product with a storefront-confidence score (rating * log(review_count)), (b) for each product, summarize whatever community scrutiny exists — is it 'community-validated', 'mixed', or 'community-skeptical', (c) highlight any divergence where storefront ratings look trustworthy but community sentiment is skeptical, (d) recommend 3 products a cautious buyer should still feel good about. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Shopping (health-household) + Reddit (science + AskReddit). Forces quantitative ranking (rating * log(reviews)) plus qualitative skepticism mapping.
